---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: 'OOH Session #129...<br>[Presentation Accessibility Enhancements!!]{.nostress}[{{< iconify la:accessible-icon >}}]{.bigger}'
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: ../../../img/access.png
  data-background-opacity: ".8"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://thebasie.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/accessibility.png   #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
filters: 
  - reveal-header
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
+ Recap session #128
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[Presentation Accessibility Enhancements!!]{.nostress}[{{< iconify la:accessible-icon >}}]{.bigger}](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-a11y)
+ Shared problem-solving

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 170px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/5_5_26">
  <img src="/img/title128.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#128: 

![](https://pngimg.com/uploads/sticky_note/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="100"}

![](https://png.pngtree.com/png-vector/20230808/ourmid/pngtree-kitchen-table-clipart-cartoon-sytle-isolated-on-white-with-table-and-vector-png-image_6868363.png){.absolute top="280" right="115" height="200"}

## [[List Tables!!]{.bangers}](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/tables.html#list-tables)

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}

````
::: {#tbl-weird .list-table} #<1>
What a unique table!!!       #<2>

- - Wazzat                   #<3>
  - Uselessness
  - Yadda                    #<3>

- - `sum()`
    - bullet
  - ```r
    sum(1,2,3)
    ```
  - ![](https://t3.ftcdn.net/jpg/03/82/90/02/360_F_382900298_PRa4JfdbMUQixhkEdjhC64Ci4gqB5EDL.jpg){.absolute height="120"}

- - `sd()`  
{{< iconify line-md:sunny-filled-loop-to-moon-filled-alt-loop-transition style="color:#ffce1b;" >}}
  - ![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcDI3dmVyODNleXltZDRvYXFsc211dTNnMjhydnFtODFsb3JmOHQ5cSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/jarNoneOdIBC8/giphy.gif){.absolute height="120"}
  - ```r
    sd(4,5,6)
    ```
:::

Check out @tbl-weird

````
1. large number of [bootstrap classes](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/tables.html#using-bootstrap-classes) can be applied here within curly brackets (not operative in all renderred formats)
2. title/label specification different here with `.list-table`
3. nested bullets define placement of content (first--level bullet indicates new row)

Check out @tbl-weird

:::

::: {.column width="60%"}

::: {#tbl-weird .list-table}
What a unique table!!!

- - Wazzat
  - Uselessness
  - Yadda

- - `sum()`
    - bullet
  - ```r
    sum(1,2,3)
    ```
  - ![](https://t3.ftcdn.net/jpg/03/82/90/02/360_F_382900298_PRa4JfdbMUQixhkEdjhC64Ci4gqB5EDL.jpg){.absolute height="120"}

- - `sd()`  
{{< iconify line-md:sunny-filled-loop-to-moon-filled-alt-loop-transition style="color:#ffce1b;" >}}
  - ![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcDI3dmVyODNleXltZDRvYXFsc211dTNnMjhydnFtODFsb3JmOHQ5cSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/jarNoneOdIBC8/giphy.gif){.absolute height="120"}
  - ```r
    sd(4,5,6)
    ```
:::

:::

:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/thumbnails/037/224/455/small/ai-generated-cute-tablecloth-in-cartoon-style-png.png){.absolute right="-150" top="-20" height="250"}

# Today...

![](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcTN4MjVjMGxuOHR3eGdjbWN6eDMxb2R1aWZzN29jOXo3dDA3N2J3aSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/L7dzJ0g5hjQXXirWUu/giphy.gif)

## [[Presentation Accessibility Enhancements!!]{.nostress}[{{< iconify la:accessible-icon >}}]{.bigger}](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-a11y)

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}

### [Built--in {{< iconify simple-icons:revealdotjs style="color:#e157e6;" >}}{{< iconify vscode-icons:file-type-js-official >}}](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/presenting.html#slide-tone)

+ [`axe-core` integration](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-accessibility.html)
+ alt text (images)
+ [slide--tone](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/presenting.html#slide-tone)
+ accessibility themes
+ `lang`

:::

::: {.column width="60%"}

### Extension capabilities

- Skip navigation links
- Enhanced focus indicators
- Reduced motion support
- High contrast mode
- Font size controls
- Screen reader announcements
- Accessibility settings menu (press `A`)

:::

:::

![](https://gitlab.poul.org/uploads/-/system/project/avatar/109/reveal.js-2020-05-28_09-58-06-icon-resized.png){.absolute right="-150" bottom="180" height="220"}

## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} & {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
sessionInfo()
```
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}

Quarto version `r quarto::quarto_version()`

:::

:::

## Grok

**Quarto** provides strong accessibility support, especially for its HTML-based outputs (including **RevealJS** presentations), through semantic structure, built-in tools, author-controllable features, and extensions. Much of this stems from Pandoc's HTML generation and Reveal.js underpinnings.

### General Accessibility Features in Quarto (HTML Outputs)
- **Axe-core Integration** (Quarto 1.8+): Quarto includes built-in support for **axe-core**, a leading open-source accessibility testing engine. Enable it in YAML for `html`, `revealjs`, or `dashboard` formats:

  ```yaml
  format:
    html:  # or revealjs
      axe: true   # Console warnings in dev tools
      # axe:
      #   output: document  # Visible report on page (good for debugging)
      #   output: json      # For automation
  ```

  This catches issues like insufficient color contrast, missing alt text, ARIA problems, etc., during preview.

- **Semantic HTML Structure**: Quarto's Markdown-to-HTML conversion produces well-structured output (headings, lists, tables, figures) that benefits screen readers. Document metadata (title, lang, etc.) flows into proper HTML attributes.

- **Alt Text for Figures**: Use `fig-alt` chunk option (or image attributes) for descriptive text. This passes through to HTML (and increasingly to PDF).

- **Color Contrast & Themes**: The `a11y` syntax highlighting theme provides good contrast and adapts to light/dark modes. Brand colors and other themes can be chosen with accessibility in mind.

- **Language & Direction**: Set `lang` in YAML for proper screen reader support and bidirectional text handling.

- **PDF Accessibility** (Quarto 1.9+): Experimental support for tagged PDFs (PDF/UA standards) via LaTeX (`ua-2`) or Typst (`ua-1`), including metadata, semantic structure, and alt text.

Other author best practices include providing captions, using proper heading levels, avoiding complex layouts that break linear reading order, and testing with screen readers.

### Accessibility in RevealJS Presentations
RevealJS outputs are HTML-based, so they inherit the above features (axe-core checks, semantic structure, alt text, etc.). Additional RevealJS-specific capabilities include:

- **Slide Tone**: Plays subtle auditory cues (increasing pitch) on slide changes or incremental reveals. Useful for presenters relying on audio feedback (originally requested by a blind user).

  ```yaml
  format:
    revealjs:
      slide-tone: true
  ```

- **Keyboard Navigation & Controls**: Full keyboard support, swipe/touch navigation, progress bar, overview mode, and navigation menu. Options like `controls`, `progress`, `history`, and `touch` enhance usability.

- **Speaker View & Notes**: Accessible speaker notes (press `S`) and PDF export for handouts.

- **Incremental Content & Fragments**: Supports pauses and progressive reveals while maintaining logical reading order.

- **High-Contrast & Reduced Motion Considerations**: Use accessible themes; avoid overly animated transitions where possible.

- **Self-Contained Output**: `embed-resources: true` creates portable files, though some plugins may have limitations.

**Known Challenges**: Complex Quarto HTML (including RevealJS) can sometimes flag issues in institutional checkers (e.g., Blackboard). Vertical slides may confuse some users. Test thoroughly.

### Dedicated RevealJS Accessibility Extension
Install the community **quarto-revealjs-a11y** extension for advanced features:

- Skip navigation links
- Enhanced focus indicators
- Reduced motion support
- High contrast mode
- Font size controls
- Screen reader announcements
- Accessibility settings menu (press `A`)

This is highly recommended for presentations targeting strict accessibility standards (e.g., WCAG/ADA).

### Tips for Better Accessibility
- Always add `fig-alt`, captions, and descriptive link text.
- Use axe checks during development.
- Test with tools like screen readers (NVDA, VoiceOver), WAVE, or Lighthouse.
- Prefer HTML/RevealJS over PDF when possible for dynamic accessibility.
- For presentations, consider the a11y extension + slide-tone.

Quarto's accessibility continues to improve (e.g., stronger PDF support in 1.9+). Check the official docs for the latest: [HTML Accessibility](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-accessibility.html) and [RevealJS reference](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/).

For institution-specific compliance, combine Quarto features with manual testing.
